inputs.label: Length (ft)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the area to be covered with sod in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the area to be covered with sod in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çim serilecek alanın fit cinsinden uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge der mit Rasen zu bedeckenden Fläche in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la zone à couvrir de gazon en pieds.

inputs.label: Width (ft)
inputs.businessContext: Width of the area to be covered with sod in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the area to be covered with sod in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çim serilecek alanın fit cinsinden genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite der mit Rasen zu bedeckenden Fläche in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la zone à couvrir de gazon en pieds.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage of sod to account for cutting and fitting waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage of sod to account for cutting and fitting waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve uyum kaybını karşılamak için ek çim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz an Rasen für Verschnitt und Anpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire de gazon pour tenir compte des pertes de coupe et d'ajustement.

inputs.label: Coverage per Roll (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Area covered by a single roll of sod in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area covered by a single roll of sod in square feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir çim rulosunun fit kare cinsinden kapladığı alan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Von einer Rolle abgedeckte Fläche in Quadratfuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface couverte par un seul rouleau de gazon en pieds carrés.

inputs.label: Price per Roll ($)
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of one roll of sod in dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of one roll of sod in dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir rulo çimin dolar cinsinden birim maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire d'un rouleau de gazon en dollars.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
